creator: diizzy@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 233453
Patch for ffmpeg2theora

Theora itself hasn't seen development apart from minor fixes in over 10 years and have been superseded by H.264/H.265 and AV1 (depending on view regarding royalties) and by now this port has outlived its purpose. Users still wanting to encode in this format can still use ffmpeg as-is.
